name: bamstorm_bench
title: Bamstorm BAM Reader Benchmark
summary: Benchmark BAM read throughput: bamstorm vs samtools vs RabbitBAM vs pysam

inputSpec.name: docker_image
inputSpec.label: Docker image
inputSpec.help: Full Docker image reference, e.g. docker.io/yourname/bamstorm-bench:latest

inputSpec.name: repeats
inputSpec.label: Repeats
inputSpec.help: Timed repetitions per configuration; fastest run is reported

outputSpec.name: results_csv
outputSpec.label: Results CSV
outputSpec.help: Benchmark results: tool, threads, elapsed_s, throughput_mb_s, records

outputSpec.name: bench_log
outputSpec.label: Benchmark log
outputSpec.help: Full stdout from the benchmark run
